Retirement Planning & Wealth Management in Utah, Idaho & Nationwide

A Portfolio Is Not a Plan.

You've spent decades building your savings. Now it's time to turn them into a retirement you can actually enjoy — with reliable income, lower taxes, and a plan that works even when markets don't.

GET YOUR FREE ASSESSMENT → FREE BOOK CHAPTER →

Mike Stevens and the Capital Wealth Advisors team have helped 1,000+ families retire with confidence since 2009. Fiduciary. Always.

Families Served 1,000+
Years of Experience 25+
Radio Show in Utah #1

THE RETIREMENT MONEY MAP™

Five Pillars. One Plan. Zero Guesswork.

Our proprietary framework for turning savings into a stress-free retirement.

1 Income That Lasts →

Turn your savings into reliable income streams that last your entire lifetime — not just the good years.

 2 Tax-Smart Withdrawals →

Strategic withdrawal planning that could save you thousands in unnecessary taxes every single year.

 3 Market Protection →

Protect your portfolio during downturns without sacrificing the growth you need to stay ahead of inflation.

 4 Healthcare Planning →

The blind spot most retirement plans miss. A clear framework for the costs that catch retirees off guard.

 5 Estate & Legacy →

Go beyond a basic will. Protect your family's future and leave the legacy you've earned.
SEE HOW THE MONEY MAP WORKS →

THE BOOK ON RETIREMENT

Retire Right, Retire Now

Coming Spring 2026

Mike Stevens wrote the book — literally. Retire Right, Retire Now shows you how to turn your savings into a clear, coordinated retirement strategy. No fluff. No jargon. Just the framework 1,000+ families have already used.

  • How to turn savings into reliable retirement income
  • Tax-efficient withdrawal strategies that save thousands
  • How to protect your portfolio during market volatility
  • A framework for healthcare cost planning
  • Estate and legacy planning beyond a basic will
GET YOUR FREE CHAPTER →

IN THE MEDIA

Retire Right Radio

Every week, Mike Stevens delivers straight talk on retirement planning — no jargon, no sales pitch. Just real guidance for real people navigating the biggest financial transition of their lives.

LISTEN ON APPLE PODCASTS →
AS SEEN & HEARD ON

Real Plans. Real Peace of Mind.

Planning Through a Career Change

After 28 years in federal service, they wanted to understand how FERS, TSP, and Social Security fit together before retirement. Working with Mike helped coordinate all the pieces into one clear plan.

— Federal Employee, Utah Federal benefits

Turning Savings Into Income

With $800K saved but no clear withdrawal strategy, they were worried about outliving their money. The Retirement Money Map gave them a reliable income stream and cut their tax bill by $12,000/year.

— Retired Couple, Idaho Income planning

Protecting What They Built

After watching their portfolio drop 30% in 2022 with no advisor response, they switched to Capital Wealth. Mike's proactive approach meant they were repositioned before the next downturn.

— Retiree, Virtual Client Portfolio protection

This Is For You If...

✓ You've saved diligently but aren't sure if it's enough
✓ You're within 10 years of retirement (or already retired)
✓ You have a portfolio but not a coordinated plan
✓ You're worried about taxes eating into your retirement income
✓ You want clarity, not complexity, from your financial strategy
✓ You're a federal employee navigating FERS, TSP, or separation benefits
TAKE THE 2-MINUTE ASSESSMENT →

100% free. No obligation. Your information is never shared.
